hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: Everything you need to build a fast, modern, and multilingual website.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: We build fast, modern, and scalable websites using the latest technologies.

items.title: Content Management
items.description: We organize your site content using structured JSON files — simple and version-controlled.

items.title: Localization
items.description: We prepare translated content so your site reaches audiences in multiple languages.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: We fine-tune load times, Core Web Vitals, and SEO so your site ranks and loads fast.

items.title: Design Systems
items.description: Consistent, reusable UI components built with Tailwind CSS and your brand in mind.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Ongoing updates, security patches, and content changes so you stay worry-free.
